# platformAddNodeAndSave

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformAddNodeAndSave

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformAddNodeAndSaveMutation(); mutate({ input: '<PlatformAddNodeAndSaveInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformAddNodeAndSaveMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformAddNodeAndSaveMutation();
mutate({ input: '<PlatformAddNodeAndSaveInput>' });
```
